publishedAbstract: * Listing or uploading files from S3 bucket always fails with a `504 (Gateway Time-out)`. Sometimes mid-way through an operation. For example, a backup operator with many files. Additionlly, this issue can be present if the db is not set to the correct Collate which is `C`. If the db is not set to Collate `C` you may also see greater consumption on the `db-noobaa-db-pg-0` PVC.
publishedTitle: "504 Gateway Timeout" During NooBaa Bucket Operations - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
